prs.title: Add ingress-nginx migration banner on documentation pages
Fix StripPrefix and StripPrefixRegex to slice the prefix using encoded prefix length
Fix allow colons and tildes in api.basePath validation
Fix auth-response-headers whitespace trimming in ingress-nginx provider
Fix rewrite directive in configuration-snippet to trim quotes
Fix rewrite-target to handle full URL
Fix panic with Failover services in Kubernetes
Prevent duplicate user headers in basic and digest auth middleware
Fix postgres STARTTLS with TLS termination
Preserve health check status updater when service has middlewares
Handle empty rewrite-target like unset rewrite-target
Change default maxRequestBodyBytes  option value of retry middleware
Improve the multi tenant security note
Clarify CNAME explanation in ACME Documentation
Remove unsupported servers[n].address from TCP label examples
Make basic auth check timing constant
Add OTel-conformant trace context attributes to access logs
Add an extension point for mod-sec annotations
Add maxResponseBodySize configuration on HTTP provider
Fix unnecessary escaping of pipe in regexp examples
Fix use-regex annotation behavior and add strictValidatePathType config for ingress-nginx provider
Remove path parsing with grpc healthcheck
Add support for upstream-hash-by NGINX annotation
Use unicode.MaxASCII for clearer ASCII check
Fix priority display in dashboard and ACME bypass redirect
Fix custom error pages behavior for ingress-nginx provider
Fix from to www nginx annotation
Service failover support in TraefikService CRD
Remove unused context import from test file
Fix basePath validation for dashboard template
Allow entry points to be specified on Nginx Ingresses
Fix Go version pinning in CI workflows
Add missing `.http` to TOML table names
Fix incorrect TOML example in entrypoints docs
Support limit-rps annotation for Ingress NGINX
Support server-alias annotation for Ingress NGINX
Add temporary note to advertise the incoming NGINX annotations
Add maxResponseBodySize configuration to forwardAuth middleware
Fix case sensitivity on x-forwarded headers for Connection
Fix HasSecureHeadersDefined returning false when stsSeconds is 0
Add AllowCrossNamespaceResources and GlobalAllowedResponseHeader options to control custom headers annotations
Correct encoded characters allowance in entrypoints.md
Remove deprecated swarm:1.0.0 image used in DockerSuite
Replace uses of hashicorp/go-multierror with stdlib errors.Join
Enable retries based on HTTP response status codes, timeout, and non-idempotent methods
Make labelSelector option casing more consistent
Allow Stdio access logs alongsige OTLP logging
Fix incorrect hostname matching between listener and route
Make TLSStore gracefully handle missing secrets
Add global option to disable X-Forwarded-For appending
Add support for variable interpolation in auth-signin NGINX annotation
Support file path for metrics.influxdb2.token option
Services middleware and Gateway API filters on HTTP backends
Support cipher suites configuration with ServersTransport
Use modern WaitGroup.Go function in additional places
Print access logs for rejected requests and warn about new behavior
Update OpenTelemetry to v1.38.0 and semantic conventions to v1.37.0
Add support for proxy-read-timeout and proxy-send-timeout NGINX annotations
Simplify Go version refs in CI templates
Restore remote Upgrade to Hub button web component
Reject absolute URL in healthcheck path configuration
Fix kubernetes.md with correct http redirections
Remove conn deadline after STARTTLS negociation
Cap TLS record length to RFC 8446 limit in ClientHello peeking
Use url.Parse to validate X-Forwarded-Prefix value
Failover according to response status code
Use ParentBased sampler to respect parent span sampling decision
Add support for from-to-www-redirect NGINX annotation
Fix the errors middleware's document for Kubernetes CRD
Clean Up Menu Entries & Update Expose Overview
Remove number prefix in ingress-nginx fixtures
Document Path matcher placeholder removal in v3 migration guide
Add configuration transformer mechanism to the ConfigurationWatcher
Add support for app-root nginx annotation
chore: pin GitHub Actions to SHA hashes for supply chain security
Split Expose User Guides & Add Multi-Layer Routing Section
Add authSignInURL in forward auth middleware
Add support for session-cookie-expires nginx annotation
Remove invalid private key in log
Remove extra dots in migration guide
Remove extraneous dots in migration guide
Improve the structure of the routing reference pages
Add configmaps right to Ingress NGINX RBAC
Fix condition used for serving and fenced endpoints
Document negative priority support for routers
Replace Split in loops with more efficient SplitSeq
Fix migration guide URLs in deprecation notice
Add ingressClassName field to the CRDs spec
Prevent Ingress Nginx provider http router to attach to an entrypoint with TLS
Add timeout to ACME-TLS/1 challenge handshake
Validate X-Forwarded-Prefix value for dashboard redirect
Replace hardcoded references to LetsEncrypt in log messages
Add product comparison matrix and features page
Bring back security section on API & Dashboard documentation page
Fix panic for empty defaultBackend and defaultBackend without resources
Fix link description in Traefik Proxy documentation
Add RBAC documentation for Ingress NGINX provider
Fix encoded characters entryPoint option documentation
Fix mutually exclusive verification for Redis
Improve the K8S multi-tenancy security note
Clarify doc about encoded characters rejection
Print access logs for rejected requests and warn about new behavior
Add a Breaking change note to the changelog
Add auth-signin to unsupported nginx annotations list
Fix loadbalancer doc for highest random weight
Fix typo in API dashboard configuration instructions
NGINX Ingress Controller to Traefik Migration Guide
Fix links of Helm chart values reference to providers.kubernetesGateway.enabled
Improve the configuration options display of the Kubernetes ingress-nginx provider
Fix default value of ingress-nginx provider in documentation
Fix SSL redirect to match NGINX behavior
Fix otel not working without USER
Fix the service name for ingress-nginx provider
Upgrade k3s version k8s integration tests
Close listener at last sequence to avoid flakiness
Change ForwardAuth error log level from DEBUG to ERROR
Correctly Format the HTTP Service Documentation
Protect CI against supply chain attack on nodejs
Add documentation for loadbalancer.server.url in Docker and Swarm providers
Deprecate Kubernetes Ingress NGINX provider experimental flag
Revert "Avoid allocations in readLoop by using sync.Pool"
Update letsencrypt/pebble to use ghcr image
Avoid allocations in readLoop by using sync.Pool
Fix Gateway API version and the list of features supported
Fix link for accesslog.fields.names in documentation
Make the aggregator compute provider namespace for router's parentRefs
Filter unknown nodes with file and env for the deprecation loader
Add missing ACME options and clean up table for more visibility
Fix default encodings in compress middleware
Fix broken links in TCP Service and HTTP Router documentation
Fix typo in v3.6 migration guide
Allow publishing services with type ExternalName
Clarify health check requirement for server status metric
Fix heading levels and add links
Fix incorrect option and lint page
Fix typo in TLS certificate generation description
Enable stdout logging when OTLP is enabled
Add Traefik Hub demo in dashboard
Add missing reference docs for statusRewrites in errors middleware
Add API basePath documentation and fix broken links
Reduce vertical padding in dashboard table rows for more compact layout
Add least time load balancing strategy
Fix Hetzner env var name inside documentation
Fix anchors in basic auth configuration options
Do not fail when pod is not found in K8sAttributesDetector
Fix KV key name used to check if connection is alive
Align documentation on default otlp endpoint
Clean and avoid collisions of anchors in option tables
Fix markdown rendering for table anchors
Fix wrong references to router's pages
Use k8s.ResourceEventHandler for Gateway API provider
Implement HTTP2 HPACK table size options
Add warning when maxBodySize is not set
Add dedicated pages for routers and fix doc links in CRDs
Fix typo in ingressroute.md from pirority to priority
Fix documentation on how to restrict the scope of service discovery
OVHcloud (OpenStack Octavia) to Cloud-Specific IP Management
Add wildcard host in Host and HostSNI matchers
Display server weight in service detail view
Fix default value of http.sanitizePath in docs
Add missing redirects for Getting started
Clarify that NGINX Ingress watchNamespace watches only one namespace
Fix comment and unnecessary allocation in withRoutingPath
Fix TLS behavior in ingress-nginx provider
Add a note about how to disable connection reuse with backends
